name: Word Document Processor
description: Comprehensive Word document creation, editing, co-authoring, and analysis using Anthropic's production document skill. Supports tracked changes, comments, collaborative redlining, and complex document structure manipulation. This skill underlies Claude's native .docx capabilities on claude.ai.

findings_summary.notes: Official Anthropic skill from anthropics/skills repository. Source-available (not open source) — this is one of Anthropic's production document skills powering Claude's file creation features. Extensive Python scripts for docx manipulation with full ISO/ECMA/Microsoft schema validation support. Verified at skills/docx/ in the repo tree.
